calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Document Request, To Produce Documents And To Impose Monetary Sanctions, Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Document Request And To Produce Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $740, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
